nebula_audit_score: N/A (not a landing page — resource guide)
patterns: 20-email evergreen loop, 1/week cadence, loops from email 20 back to 1 (5-month gap)
Ego Protection Protocol — never accuse reader directly, frame as market pattern or third-party example
4-part email anatomy: Hook (external perspective) → Micro-dose (20% value) → Bridge (to lead magnet) → P.S. (sales door)
Perfect rhythm instruction set: literal language, no metaphors, forbidden vocabulary list, no em-dashes, imperfect paragraph lengths
Consumption CTA in body, Sales Door only in P.S. — separates learners from buyers without diluting value
Requires 3 upstream assets: ICP_MEMO, OFFER_MEMO, LEAD_MAGNET — specificity of inputs determines specificity of outputs
notes: Strongest pattern: the micro-dose philosophy. Each email teaches ONE insight from the lead magnet completely (no teasers). The bridge points to the full asset. The P.S. is the only sales location. This keeps open rates high and unsubscribe rates low by not forcing a decision on every email. The forbidden vocabulary list (no 'leverage', 'unlock', 'synergy', etc.) and imperfect rhythm rules produce genuinely human-sounding copy. Model recommendation ranking: Gemini Pro > Claude > ChatGPT for this task.
actions_taken: Created /home/mike/nebula/roas-cliff.html — hosted lead magnet page deployed (Nebula's ROAS Cliff guide)
Resolved all [LINK], [AUDIT LINK], [STRIPE LINK] placeholders in distribution_assets.md
Fixed all bare P.S. [STRIPE LINK] lines to full sentence with URL
Verified Ego Protection — no accusatory 'you are failing' language in emails
actionable_extractions: Micro-dose philosophy: every email teaches ONE complete insight from bridge asset, no teasers
P.S. as exclusive sales door — body stays educational, buyers self-select via P.S. link
Forbidden vocabulary list + imperfect rhythm: concrete instructions produce better output than 'write like a human'
3-upstream-asset dependency chain (ICP → OFFER → LEAD MAGNET → EMAILS)

name: TrustOS Resource Archive
patterns: Single-prompt architecture: each resource is ONE prompt that does the work, with 4-5 steps of instructions
Synthetic Content Firewall — AI filter that detects vendor camouflage (Problem-Agitation-Solution structure) and AI fingerprints (perfect rhythm, hedging, forbidden vocabulary) BEFORE analysis
ICP_MEMO dependency chain: every downstream resource consumes the ICP_MEMO (same document, 15+ prompts)
Lead Qualification via scoring matrix — weighted points per criteria (company fit, person fit, behavioral fit), not binary pass/fail
Copy Optimization Protocol: 5-pillar Consumption Protocol (Hook → Commitment Slide → Authority Anchor → Liking Bridge → Scarcity Closer)
Cal.com CTA on every page — 'Free 30-min strategy call' — single conversion path across all resources
Consistent voice rules across every resource: forbidden vocabulary, imperfect rhythm, no em-dashes, no metaphors
high_value_steals: Synthetic Content Firewall — filter out AI-generated and marketing content from lead scraping pipeline
ICP scoring matrix — weighted lead scoring before outreach (vs. Nebula's binary trigger-match)
5-pillar Consumption Protocol — psychological depth for audit methodology
actions_taken: Created /home/mike/nebula/growth_system/content_firewall.py — Synthetic Content Firewall module for lead pipeline
Saved Consumption Protocol reference to growth_system/consumption_protocol.md
notes: TrustOS is the most complete B2B AI resource library found. 27 published + 25+ coming soon. Single-prompt model makes each resource self-contained and usable. The Synthetic Content Firewall is the standout pattern — it addresses the fundamental problem with AI-web-research: AI-generated content polluting the training data. Nebula can adapt this for lead quality filtering.
